fn parse_command(input: &str) -> Command {
    match input {
        "start" => Command::Start,
        "stop" => Command::Stop,
        "restart" => Command::Restart,
        _ => unreachable!(),
    }
}

fn get_priority(level: &str) -> u8 {
    match level {
        "low" => 1,
        "medium" => 2,
        "high" => 3,
        "critical" => 4,
        _ => unreachable!("invalid priority level"),
    }
}

fn process_response(resp: &Response) -> String {
    match resp.status {
        200 => "ok".to_string(),
        404 => "not found".to_string(),
        500 => "server error".to_string(),
        _ => unreachable!(),
    }
}

enum Command { Start, Stop, Restart }
struct Response { status: u16 }
